caption: In a large, brightly lit hall with high ceilings and ornate chandeliers, a group of men are performing coordinated martial arts movements on a blue carpeted floor. Several men are dressed in white traditional uniforms, while one central figure wears a bright blue outfit and another on the right wears black. In the background, a seated audience watches the performance. As the sequence progresses, the men shift their weight and adjust their stances in unison. The man in blue moves from a more upright position into a deeper, more grounded stance with his arms raised. Simultaneously, the man in black shifts his weight to his right leg, extending his left leg outward. The men in white similarly transition their postures to match the synchronized flow of the demonstration. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
